snippets.title: DataTransferService listMulticloudDataTransferConfigs Sample
snippets.description: Lists the `MulticloudDataTransferConfig` resources in a specified project and location.

snippets.title: DataTransferService getMulticloudDataTransferConfig Sample
snippets.description: Gets the details of a `MulticloudDataTransferConfig` resource.

snippets.title: DataTransferService createMulticloudDataTransferConfig Sample
snippets.description: Creates a `MulticloudDataTransferConfig` resource in a specified project and location.

snippets.title: DataTransferService updateMulticloudDataTransferConfig Sample
snippets.description: Updates a `MulticloudDataTransferConfig` resource in a specified project and location.

snippets.title: DataTransferService deleteMulticloudDataTransferConfig Sample
snippets.description: Deletes a `MulticloudDataTransferConfig` resource.

snippets.title: DataTransferService listDestinations Sample
snippets.description: Lists the `Destination` resources in a specified project and location.

snippets.title: DataTransferService getDestination Sample
snippets.description: Gets the details of a `Destination` resource.

snippets.title: DataTransferService createDestination Sample
snippets.description: Creates a `Destination` resource in a specified project and location.

snippets.title: DataTransferService updateDestination Sample
snippets.description: Updates a `Destination` resource in a specified project and location.

snippets.title: DataTransferService deleteDestination Sample

snippets.title: DataTransferService getMulticloudDataTransferSupportedService Sample
snippets.description: Gets the details of a service that is supported for Data Transfer Essentials.

snippets.title: DataTransferService listMulticloudDataTransferSupportedServices Sample
snippets.description: Lists the services in the project for a region that are supported for Data Transfer Essentials.

snippets.title: DataTransferService listHubs Sample
snippets.description: Lists the Network Connectivity Center hubs associated with a given project.

snippets.title: DataTransferService getHub Sample
snippets.description: Gets details about a Network Connectivity Center hub.

snippets.title: DataTransferService createHub Sample
snippets.description: Creates a new Network Connectivity Center hub in the specified project.

snippets.title: DataTransferService updateHub Sample
snippets.description: Updates the description and/or labels of a Network Connectivity Center hub.

snippets.title: DataTransferService deleteHub Sample
snippets.description: Deletes a Network Connectivity Center hub.

snippets.title: DataTransferService listHubSpokes Sample
snippets.description: Lists the Network Connectivity Center spokes associated with a specified hub and location. The list includes both spokes that are attached to the hub and spokes that have been proposed but not yet accepted.

snippets.title: DataTransferService queryHubStatus Sample
snippets.description: Query the Private Service Connect propagation status of a Network Connectivity Center hub.

snippets.title: DataTransferService listSpokes Sample
snippets.description: Lists the Network Connectivity Center spokes in a specified project and location.

snippets.title: DataTransferService getSpoke Sample
snippets.description: Gets details about a Network Connectivity Center spoke.

snippets.title: DataTransferService createSpoke Sample
snippets.description: Creates a Network Connectivity Center spoke.

snippets.title: DataTransferService updateSpoke Sample
snippets.description: Updates the parameters of a Network Connectivity Center spoke.

snippets.title: DataTransferService rejectHubSpoke Sample
snippets.description: Rejects a Network Connectivity Center spoke from being attached to a hub. If the spoke was previously in the `ACTIVE` state, it transitions to the `INACTIVE` state and is no longer able to connect to other spokes that are attached to the hub.

snippets.title: DataTransferService acceptHubSpoke Sample
snippets.description: Accepts a proposal to attach a Network Connectivity Center spoke to a hub.

snippets.title: DataTransferService acceptSpokeUpdate Sample
snippets.description: Accepts a proposal to update a Network Connectivity Center spoke in a hub.

snippets.title: DataTransferService rejectSpokeUpdate Sample
snippets.description: Rejects a proposal to update a Network Connectivity Center spoke in a hub.

snippets.title: DataTransferService deleteSpoke Sample
snippets.description: Deletes a Network Connectivity Center spoke.

snippets.title: DataTransferService getRouteTable Sample
snippets.description: Gets details about a Network Connectivity Center route table.

snippets.title: DataTransferService getRoute Sample
snippets.description: Gets details about the specified route.

snippets.title: DataTransferService listRoutes Sample
snippets.description: Lists routes in a given route table.

snippets.title: DataTransferService listRouteTables Sample
snippets.description: Lists route tables in a given hub.

snippets.title: DataTransferService getGroup Sample

snippets.title: DataTransferService listGroups Sample
snippets.description: Lists groups in a given hub.

snippets.title: DataTransferService updateGroup Sample
snippets.description: Updates the parameters of a Network Connectivity Center group.
